{{Infobox location
| name = Arelius family library
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Arelius family]] has a [[library]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c8">''Blackflame'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Arelius family library]] contains an analysis on the uses of a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Arelius family library]] contains information about [[Paths]] and techniques.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
